case_title: CHARLES GUEST VS. RIEZEBOS HOLZBAUR GROUP, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY GUEST, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT RIEZEBOS HOLZBAUR GROUP, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $10.00. SERVED NOV-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT RIEZEBOS HOLZBAUR GROUP, LLC
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY GUEST, CHARLES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2012 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JAN-03-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2013 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUEST, CHARLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIEZEBOS HOLZBAUR GROUP, LLC $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,860.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
